# Support

## Getting Help

### Community

- **[GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/StanislavMakhrov/green-ledger/discussions)** — Ask questions, share ideas, and discuss features
- **[Search existing issues](https://github.com/StanislavMakhrov/green-ledger/issues)** — Your question might already be answered

### Bug Reports

Found a bug? Please [open an issue](https://github.com/StanislavMakhrov/green-ledger/issues/new) with:

- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Browser and environment details

### Feature Requests

1. Check [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/StanislavMakhrov/green-ledger/discussions) first
2. If not discussed, open a new Discussion or Issue

### Security Issues

Please see our [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md) for reporting vulnerabilities.

## Contact
